channel.title: Tsan on ErrorCode — Error Code Reference & Solutions
channel.description: Recent content in Tsan on ErrorCode — Error Code Reference & Solutions

item.title: [Solution] Swift Error — Thread Sanitizer Error
item.description:
Thread Sanitizer Error

Thread Sanitizer (TSan) detects data races — when two threads access the same memory location simultaneously and at least one is a write, without proper synchronization.

Description

Data races are undefined behavior in Swift. TSan is a runtime tool that instruments code to detect concurrent unsynchronized access. When TSan finds a race, it reports the conflicting accesses with stack traces. Data races can cause crashes, corrupted data, and unpredictable behavior.
